name: lumaline
description: Trust-first sponsored status line for Claude Code. Official statusLine only — signed feed, no bundle patching, no CSP changes.
//private: Hard guard against an accidental `npm publish` during the GitHub beta. The beta installs via `npm i -g github:JaamesBond/LumaLine` (git, unaffected by this flag). REMOVE `private` at GA to publish 0.1.0 to the npm registry (supersedes the 0.0.1 reservation stub).
